title: MIRACLE FLIGHTS - 211info
text: MIRACLE FLIGHTS MIRACLE FLIGHTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides commercial flights for children needing specialized medical care or second opinions not available in their local communities. Flights serve domestic US treatment facilities and support travel to retrieve service dogs or attend required training sessions. Children may be accompanied by up to two parents or legal guardians, and qualifying applicants can receive assistance as often as needed. 2764 N Green Valley Parkway Suite 115 Henderson, NV 89014 Eligibility: -Ages 0-17 -Must meet income criteria. Financial thresholds are based on household size and are generally three times the annual federal poverty guidelines listed by the US Department of Health and Human Services. -Requests must be made at least 14 days before the departure date Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm Email - (800) 359-1711 800--1711 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 359-1711 800-FLY-1711 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to view financial guidelines FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Application package including specific flight request -Local physician referral letter -Medical appointment confirmation letter -Proof of income (gross annual household income from all sources combined) with the first two pages of the most current 1040 federal tax return and/or SSI/SSDI statements -Birth certificate -Domestic Program: All documents must be received at least 14 days before the requested departure date LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Air Fare Service Animal Purchase Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MIRACLE FLIGHTS
